The '''Saheelindeeli''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] [[Primate/Legends|primates]] indigenous to [[Saheelindeel]]. The ape-like [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] were green-furred [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. They had limited technology, and were just starting to move ahead toward automation by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 ABY]]. They had a matriarchal society.

{{Species-stub}}
